zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelheid of Öttingen於大約1334年出生在德國貝也史瓦本時，她的父親Pataro Buzzacarini36歲，母親Francesca Gonzaga30歲。她和Francesco I Da Carrara至少有3個女兒。她去世於1378年10月4日享年45歲，埋葬在義大利維圖帕多瓦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelheid of Öttingen于大约1334年出生在德国貝也史瓦本时，她的父亲Pataro Buzzacarini36岁，母亲Francesca Gonzaga30岁。她和Francesco I Da Carrara至少有3个女儿。她去世于1378年10月4日享年45岁，埋葬在意大利維圖帕多瓦。

nameMeanings.name: Adelheid
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Öttingen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German (also Öttinger): habitational name for someone from any of the places called Otting or Öttingen, in Swabia, Bavaria, and Lorraine (France). Compare Oettinger .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Ettinger  , a cognate of 2 above.

variants.name: Otting
meanings: North German (also Ötting) and Dutch: patronymic from the personal name Otto .
North German (also Ötting): habitational name for someone from Ottingen in Lower Saxony. Compare Oetting .

variants.name: Oettinger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hanni, Christoph, Siegbert.
German (also Öttinger): habitational name for someone from a place in Bavaria called Oettingen or a place in Lorraine (France) called Öttingen (French Ottange). Compare Ottinger and Ettinger .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Ettinger  , a cognate of 1 above.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelheid of Öttingen was born about 1334, in Swabia, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Pataro Buzzacarini, was 36 and her mother, Francesca Gonzaga, was 30. She had at least 3 daughters with Francesco I Da Carrara. She died on 4 October 1378, at the age of 45, and was buried in Padova, Veneto, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelheid of Öttingen est née environ 1334, à Schwaben, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Pataro Buzzacarini, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Francesca Gonzaga, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 filles avec Francesco I Da Carrara. Elle est décédée le 4 octobre 1378, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Padova, Veneto, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelheid of Öttingen um 1334 in Schwaben, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Pataro Buzzacarini 36 und ihre Mutter Francesca Gonzaga 30. Sie hatte mit Francesco I Da Carrara mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Oktober 1378 im Alter von 45 Jahren und wurde in Padova, Veneto, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid of Öttingen è nata il circa 1334 nel Schwaben, Bayern, Germania, sua padre, Pataro Buzzacarini, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Francesca Gonzaga, aveva 30 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figlie con Francesco I Da Carrara. Morì il 4 ottobre 1378, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Padova, Veneto, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelheid of Öttingenが約1334年にドイツバイエルンスチワベンで生まれた時，父Pataro Buzzacariniは36歳，母Francesca Gonzagaは30歳であった。彼女はFrancesco I Da Carraraとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1378年10月4日に45歳で死去し，イタリアベンエトープアドヴァにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelheid of Öttingen(이)가 대략 1334년 독일 베이른 슈와벤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Pataro Buzzacarini(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Francesca Gonzaga(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Francesco I Da Carrara(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1378년 10월 4일 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 븐토 파도바에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid of Öttingen nasceu aproximadamente 1334, em Schwaben, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Pataro Buzzacarini, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Francesca Gonzaga, tinha 30 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Francesco I Da Carrara. Ela faleceu em 4 de outubro de 1378, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Padova, Veneto, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelheid of Öttingen родилась около 1334 г. в местности щвабен, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Pataro Buzzacarini было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Francesca Gonzaga, 30. У неё было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Francesco I Da Carrara. Она умерла 4 октября 1378 г. в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности падова, винето, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelheid of Öttingen nació aproximadamente 1334, en Schwaben, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Pataro Buzzacarini, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Francesca Gonzaga, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Francesco I Da Carrara. Murió el 4 de octubre de 1378, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Padova, Veneto, Italia.
